# Helpdesk Ticket Activity Ids

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }}

Shows activities related to helpdesk tickets in a new "Activits page"
from the ticket form view. Show the state of activities related to a
ticket from their tree view, as they are shown in the kanban view.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

No configuration needed for this module.

## Usage

You can check, edit or create activites from their page in the ticket
form view.

## Known issues / Roadmap

There are no issues for the moment.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitLab Issues](https://gitlab.com/somitcoop/erp-research/odoo-helpdesk/-/issues). In
case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been
reported. If you spotted it first, help us smashing it by providing a
detailed and welcomed feedback.

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with
technical issues.
